testcase.name: putputPaymentV4

failure.message: expected [{"Payment":{"Success":true,"Data":{"DocumentNumber":"PYMT00000000530","BatchId":"___api_CR","LocationId":"BUDGETLOC02","CustomerId":"03332301204"},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Updated","Level":1}]}}] but found [{"Payment":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Checkbook is not allowed","Level":3}]}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"Payment":{"Success":true,"Data":{"DocumentNumber":"PYMT00000000530","BatchId":"___api_CR","LocationId":"BUDGETLOC02","CustomerId":"03332301204"},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Updated","Level":1}]}}]
